X-TIKA:content: Sample PDF Test Content for Apache Tika 1. Document Title Database Performance Report Author: Data Engineering Team Date: 2026-03-05 1. Introduction This document contains sample database information used to test document parsing tools. The content includes: Text paragraphs A structured table PL/SQL code snippet Image example This document is specifically designed to test content extraction systems. 2. Database Information Table Employee ID Employee Name Department Salary 101 Rahul Sharma IT 75000 102 Priya Verma HR 65000 103 Arjun Nair Finance 72000 104 Sneha Kapoor IT 80000 3. PL/SQL Query Example DECLARE v_total_salary NUMBER; BEGIN SELECT SUM(salary) INTO v_total_salary FROM employees WHERE department = 'IT'; DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Total IT Salary: ' || v_total_salary); , unless OCR is enabled.
